architectural_notes: Payment step should occur after order creation (post-order payment) rather than as a separate payment option.

existing_features.title: Remove the standalone product payment CTA from the Products section so users are not prompted to pay before placing an order. Keep the existing “Order Now” behavior that scrolls to the order form.

After a customer successfully places an order via the Order Form, display a payment option to pay the placed order’s total charge using Razorpay. The payment UI must clearly reference the newly created order (e.g., show the order ID and amount) and provide success/cancel/error feedback states.
Wire the post-order payment flow end-to-end: on Razorpay success, call the backend to mark the corresponding order as paid, then update the UI state to reflect payment success for that order.

new_feature_requests.summary: Adjust order/payment flow so payment option is shown after placing an order (pay order charge), not as a separate standalone payment option

Add backend APIs to associate a Razorpay payment success with an existing order and update the order’s paymentStatus accordingly, so the frontend can mark an order as paid after Razorpay checkout succeeds.

projectName: Show payment option only after an order is placed (pay the order charge)
